items.name: LOGIN
items.purpose: Used for 'Remember Me' login.

items.name: PASSWORD
items.purpose: Stores encrypted password for 'Remember Me' login.

items.name: REMEMBER_ME
items.purpose: Skips login for users previously authenticated on the device.

items.name: SAML_SP_SESSION_KEY
items.purpose: Enables SAML SP Single Log Out (SLO).

items.name: SAML_SSO_SESSION_ID
items.purpose: Extends SAML IDP SSO session lifetime.

items.name: com.liferay.commerce.wish.list.model.CommerceWishList#groupId
items.purpose: Enables guests to create temporary wishlists that become permanent wishlists upon account creation.

items.name: COMMERCE_COMPARE_cpDefinitionIds_commerceChannelGroupId
items.purpose: Enables product comparison.

items.name: sidebar
items.purpose: Stores sidebar state (open/closed) for future sessions.

items.name: maintenanceSeen
items.purpose: Determines visibility of server maintenance messages.

items.name: _com_liferay_portal_search_admin_web_portlet_SearchAdminPortlet_userID_hideReindexConfirmationModal
items.purpose: Determines visibility of confirmation modal during reindex.

items.name: com.liferay.search.experiences.web_addSXPElementSidebar
items.purpose: Stores Add Query Elements sidebar state (open/close) when switching tabs on the Edit Blueprint page.

items.name: liferay.cookie.consent
items.purpose: Stores user consent to cookie usage via page fragment.

items.name: GUEST_LANGUAGE_ID
items.purpose: Sets the language ID when the user's language ID is unavailable.

items.name: SELECTED_CATEGORIES_COOKIE_
items.purpose: Used when opening the categories selector popup and lasts 20 seconds.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_EXPANDED_TEXT
items.purpose: Store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users in the browser's local storage.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_INCREASED_TEXT_SPACING
items.purpose: Store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users in the browser's local storage.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_REDUCED_MOTION
items.purpose: Store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users in the browser's local storage.

items.name: ACCESSIBILITY_SETTING_UNDERLINED_LINKS1
items.purpose: Store accessibility settings for unauthenticated users in the browser's local storage.

items.name: OAUTH2_REMEMBER_DEVICE_
items.purpose: Enables users to bypass OAuth 2 authorization flow on previously authorized devices.

items.name: userTokenName
items.purpose: Stores a token to enable persistent login for token-based SSO.
